title: viola tineorum
intro: Viola tineorum, also known as the Yellow Wood Violet or Tineorum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Viola tineorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of Viola tineorum, such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
